arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola will not stand in way of ‘incredible’ Kyle Walker leaving Man City
arts.sum: Walker was left out of City’s matchday squad for Saturday’s 8-0 FA Cup demolition of Salford after expressing a desire to explore options abroad.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer stance could scupper Kyle Walker January exit
arts.sum: Kyle Walker wants to leave Manchester City this month but the club may not allow it as they plan for the rest of the season

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola refuses to close door on Kyle Walker despite Man City captain's exit plea
arts.sum: Manchester City club captain Kyle Walker has asked to leave the Etihad this month and was left out of the matchday squad for their FA Cup victory over Salford on Saturday

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick beats out Barcelona legend Pep Guardiola with latest win over Real Madrid
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic, highlighting the brilliant start to life being enjoyed by Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick in meetings with Real Madrid, has come to the fore online. This, of…

arts.ttl: Papers: Man City's Walker lined up for Inter Milan loan move
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Monday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Rooney guilt helped Plymouth stun Brentford - Nancekivell
arts.sum: Plymouth caretaker Kevin Nancekivell says "guilt" over Wayne Rooney's exit helped inspire his side to their shock FA Cup win at Brentford.

arts.ttl: Three possible replacements for Kyle Walker at Man City
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has confirmed that Manchester City captain Kyle Walker has asked to leave the club during the January transfer window. “Two days ago Kyle asked to explore the options to play abroad,” Guardiola admitted after Man City’s 8-0 win over Salford City in the FA Cup third round on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Walker wants to 'explore' Man City exit - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola says he will not stand in right-back Kyle Walker's way if he decides to leave this month.
